creator: oberman@es.net
text:
Since updating to xorg-7.2, I am unable to run openoffice.org.
OpenOffice.org starts up, draws all (or nearly all) of the first page
of the document and then exists with no error message at all. Tested
on swriter and simpres both with new and existing documents.

I have this problem on both stable and current systems.

Fix: 

None of which I am aware.
How-To-Repeat: Start openoffice.org-2.2.0 or 2.2.1.
